originalTitle: Teyana Taylor's tears and Lauryn Hill tribute steal show at BET Awards
summary: Taylor had an emotional reaction to being presented with the Icon of the Year award by Janet Jackson.
content:
An emotional Teyana Taylor (left) received her Icon of the Year award from Janet Jackson

US actress and musician Teyana Taylor was the big winner at the BET Awards in Los Angeles, and her tearful reaction to being presented with the Icon of the Year award by Janet Jackson provided one of the moments of the night.

The 35-year-old, who made her Hollywood breakthrough in recent Oscar-winning film One Battle After Another, was sobbing as Jackson introduced her.

"Oh my God... I'm gagging, they did not tell me Janet was coming," Taylor exclaimed as she joined her hero on stage.

The multi-talented Taylor, who first made her name when she choreographed a Beyoncé music video at the age of 15, also won best actress, video director of the year and the fashion vanguard award at Sunday's ceremony.

Taylor had to wipe the steam from her glasses during her acceptance speech

"I worked my ass off [for] 20 years for this," Taylor told the crowd, before taking her glasses off to clean the steam from the lenses.

"So I'm not accepting what I've earned with arrogance, I'm accepting what I've earned with gratitude.

"And this year alone I continue to give the world the artist, actress, director, choreographer, creative director, stylist, designer, writer, producer and chef! I graduated in September, y'all!"

The latter reference was about her training at the Auguste Escoffier School of Culinary Arts, which she juggled with her film and music careers.

This year has seen Taylor win a Golden Globe and receive an Oscar nomination for her role in One Battle After Another and a Grammy nomination for her album Escape Room.

She went on to tell the BET crowd that "this business can be very wicked [because] it teaches us to compete".

"I believe greatness isn't measured by how many people stand beneath you," she continued. "It's measured by how many people stand beside you because you're willing to reach back. That's the only legacy I care about."

Elsewhere at the ceremony, hip-hop duo Clipse won three prizes - album of the year, best group, and best collaboration for their song Chains & Whips with Kendrick Lamar.

British singer Olivia Dean was named best new artist after a year in which she has established herself as a bona fide global star.

Lauryn Hill received the inaugural living legend icon award, and made a surprise performance after a star-stdded tribute medley featuring Nas, SZA, Doechii, Lizzo, Doja Cat, Common and Queen Latifah.

The beloved singer, 51, rose to fame as part of The Fugees and released her seminal solo record The Miseducation of Lauryn Hill in 1998 - still her only studio album.

Addressing her fans, she said: "We hold different gifts. Someone else's gifting might be fashion. Might be hair. Might be consoling someone. It might be this microphone.

"But that gifting is very important because somebody out there needs your gift. So don't sell your gift short."
chineseTitle: 泰亚娜·泰勒 (Teyana Taylor) 的眼泪和劳伦·希尔 (Lauryn Hill) 致敬在 BET 颁奖典礼上抢尽风头
chineseSummary: 泰勒在被珍妮·杰克逊授予年度偶像奖后情绪激动。
chineseContent:
情绪激动的泰亚娜·泰勒（左）从珍妮·杰克逊手中接过年度偶像奖

美国女演员兼音乐家泰亚娜·泰勒 (Teyana Taylor) 是洛杉矶 BET 颁奖典礼的大赢家，她在被珍妮·杰克逊 (Janet Jackson) 授予年度偶像奖时泪流满面，成为当晚最精彩的时刻之一。

这位 35 岁的女士在最近的奥斯卡获奖影片《一场又一场的战斗》中取得了好莱坞的突破，当杰克逊介绍她时，她抽泣着。

“天啊……我快要作呕了，他们没有告诉我珍妮特要来，”泰勒在舞台上和她的英雄一起站起来时惊呼道。

多才多艺的泰勒因在 15 岁时为碧昂斯 (Beyoncé) 音乐录影带编舞而出名，她还在周日的颁奖典礼上获得了年度最佳女演员、年度视频导演和时尚先锋奖。

泰勒在获奖感言中不得不擦掉眼镜上的水蒸气

“为了这个，我拼命工作了 20 年，”泰勒告诉观众，然后摘下眼镜清理镜片上的蒸汽。

“所以我不会傲慢地接受我所获得的东西，我会怀着感激的心情接受我所获得的东西。

“仅今年，我就继续为世界提供艺术家、演员、导演、编舞、创意总监、造型师、设计师、作家、制片人和厨师！我九月份就毕业了，你们！”

后者是关于她在奥古斯特·埃科菲烹饪艺术学院接受的培训，她在学校期间兼顾了电影和音乐事业。

今年，泰勒凭借《一场接一场的战斗》获得金球奖并获得奥斯卡提名，并凭借专辑《逃生室》获得格莱美提名。

她接着告诉 BET 人群“这个行业可能非常邪恶，因为它教会我们如何竞争”。

“我相信伟大并不是通过有多少人站在你下面来衡量的，”她继续说道。 “这取决于有多少人因为你愿意回馈而站在你身边。这是我唯一关心的遗产。”

在颁奖典礼的其他地方，嘻哈二人组 Clipse 赢得了三项大奖：年度专辑奖、最佳组合奖以及与肯德里克·拉马尔 (Kendrick Lamar) 的歌曲《Chains & Whips》的最佳合作奖。

英国歌手奥利维亚·迪恩 (Olivia Dean) 在一年内确立了自己作为真正的全球明星的地位后，被评为最佳新人艺术家。

Lauryn Hill 获得了首届“活着的传奇人物”奖，并在 Nas、SZA、Doechii、Lizzo、Doja Cat、Common 和 Queen Latifah 等明星云集的致敬混合泳后上演了令人惊喜的表演。

这位 51 岁的受人喜爱的歌手作为 The Fugees 的一员而声名鹊起，并于 1998 年发行了她开创性的个人唱片《The Miseducation of Lauryn Hill》——这仍然是她唯一的录音室专辑。

她对粉丝们说：“我们拿着不同的礼物。别人的礼物可能是时尚。可能是头发。可能是安慰某人。可能是这个麦克风。

“但是这份礼物非常重要，因为有人需要你的礼物。所以不要低估你的礼物。”
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
